title: The Affair of the Bujah and Its Consequences
description: It is reported that the Bujah did not raid the Muslims, nor did the Muslims raid them becsiuse of the long-standing armistice between them, which we have mentioned previously in our book.472 They are of the stock of the Habash (Abyssinians), in the West. Among the black peoples (suddn) in the West are the Bujah, the Nubah, and the people of Ghanah, al-Ghaf-r,?-y-n-w-r, R-'win, F-r-ww-iyah, B-k-sum, M-kar-h, '-k-r-m and al-Khams.473 1429] There are gold mines in the territory of the Bujah. They bind by oath those who work in them.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
